titleStmt.title: SII 30.258: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 258. (A.R. No. 610 of 1915.) Teṉmalai, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Tripuranāthēśvara temple—on the east wall of the central shrine Māṟ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 4+4, Āḍi: 13-14th c. A.D.

summary.p: Damaged in the middle. This record registers the sale of land as iṟaiyili-dēvadāna to the temple of Tiruppāttīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār at Āṉaiyūr, in Āri-nāḍu by the tantirattār they include sēṉāpatis and daṇḍanāyakas of Puttūr in Āṇmā-nāḍu for 10(1/4) achchu. They agreed to remit the further taxes on behalf of the temple. This record was drafted by Irumbūḷai uḍaiyāṉ Uyyaṉiṉrāḍi Nāyagattēvaṉ, the accountant of the Tantirattār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattika
ḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu nālāva
tiṉetir nālāmāṇṭu Āṭi māsam Āṇmānā
ṭṭup puttūrp parikkirakattuc ceṉāpati taṇṭanā
yakamuḷḷiṭṭa tantirattom Ārināṭṭu Āṉaiyūr Uṭai
yār tiruppāttiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku caṇḍeśvarap
peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta yiṟaiyili tevatāṉamāva
tu Eṅkaḷ cīvitam neṉmalikkuḷattil teṟku
ṟum maṭaippokkil nīrpāñcu nellu viḷai
kkup perunāṉkellaiyāvatu ki(ḻ)ḻellai
ṉ kiḻtaṭikkut teṟkku nokkip poṉa kālukku
m teṉellai Āṟṟukku vaṭakkum melellai co
ṭavellai kiḻakku nokkip
poṉa kālukkuk kiḻakkum Āka Innāṉkellaikkuṭ
paṭṭa nilamum maramum kiṇaṟumuṭpaṭa Iṟaiyili tevatā
ṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom ceṉāpati taṇṭanāyakamuḷḷi
ṭṭa tantirattom nāyaṉār tiruppāttiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku
Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukkum marattukkuṅ kiṇaṟṟu
kkum vilai niccayitta Accu Ivaccup pattekālukkum I
nnilamum maramuṅ kiṇaṟum Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka Aṉupavi
ppārākavum Aṉupavikku(m)miṭattu Innilattāl vanta kaṭamai
kuṭimai Antarāyam veṭṭippāṭṭam pañcupili cantivikkiramappe
ṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeyaṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷe
Iṟuppomākavum Innilattāl vanta kāṟtevai kuḷatte

ccilāvaṇa
pporuḷ
māva
damaged
Ivai
poruḷaṟak
koṇṭu I
damaged
mpilum ve
ṭṭik koḷ
vārākavum In
nāṉkellai
kkut tiruccū
lakkallunā
damaged
kavum Ikku
ḷattil kuṟu�
ṭu nīro
kku Oṉṟaraiyā
ka vanta nila
ri peṟuvārākavu
m Ippaṭi Aṉu
pavikkummiṭat
tu Ivaccuppatte
kālukkum vilai
kkuṟa viṟṟu vilai
yāvaṇakkaḷa
c cellak koṇ
ṭu Ituve vilai
Ōlaiyum poruṭ
celaōlaiyumāvatā
kavum Ituvalla
tu
Ippaṭi ca
mmatittuc ca
vilaiyāka
vilaippi
ramāṇam paṇ
ṇikkuṭutto
[m n]āṭṭu
nāya
ṉār tiruppātti
śvavaramuṭaiyā
ṟku Āṇmā nāṭ
ṭupputtūr ceṉā
pati taṇṭanāyaka
muḷḷiṭṭa tanti
rattom pa
ṭaivallavaṉ
ṉeḻuttu

Itu cem pallavaraiyaṉ taṟkuṟikkum Itu naraci
ṅkarāyaṉ taṟkuṟikkum taṟkuṟimāṭṭeṟinteṉ I
vai ceyya pāṇṭiya paṉmaṉeḻuttu Ivai nā
yakaṉ cokkaṉeḻuttu Itu taruṅkai Aḻa(k)kiyāṉ ta
ṟkuṟikkum ventirapaṉmaṉ taṟkuṟikkum taṟkuṟi mā
ṭṭeṟinta ma ppaṭi Aṟiveṉ kumaraveḷāṉeḻuttu
Ivarkaḷ colla Ivvolaip piramāṇameḻutineṉ tan=tira
kaṇakku Irumpūḷai Uṭaiyāṉ Uyyaniṉṟāṭi nāya
kat tevaṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
